hooks.description: Block local-patching of ~/.claude/plugins/cache and installed_plugins.json (set CANOPY_ALLOW_CACHE_PATCH=1 to override)
Block `git push` of a plugins/canopy/ change with no VERSION bump past origin/main — the #1 cause of red `Version sync check` CI (set CANOPY_ALLOW_PUSH_NO_BUMP=1 to override)
